ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the county is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the county */,
  "average_rainfall" REAL /* Average annual rainfall in the county */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average annual temperature in the county */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil predominant in the county */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "optimal_temperature" REAL /* Optimal average temperature for the crop */,
  "optimal_rainfall" REAL /* Optimal average rainfall for the crop */,
  "growth_period" INTEGER /* Average growth period in days */,
  "yield_potential" REAL /* Potential yield per hectare under optimal conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yields" (
  "yield_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yield data point */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the data was collected */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop being tracked */,
  "hec" REAL /* Harvest area (hec) or production value (pix) of the crop */,
  "pix" INTEGER /* Production value (pix) or harvest area (hec) of the crop */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the yield data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the yield data */,
  "yield_ton" REAL /* Yield in tons */,
  "harvest_date" TEXT /* Date of harvest */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the growing season */,
  "pest_infestation" INTEGER /* Whether there was significant pest infestation */,
  "disease_outbreak" INTEGER /* Whether there was a significant disease outbreak */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yield_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yields_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yields_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data point */,
  "yield_id" INTEGER /* ID of the yield data point being analyzed */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend in the yield data (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  "pattern" TEXT /* Pattern in the yield data (e.g., seasonal, linear) */,
  "anomaly_detected" INTEGER /* Whether an anomaly was detected in the yield data */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the analysis */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the trend and pattern analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_yield_id FOREIGN KEY ("yield_id") REFERENCES yields ("yield_id")
)
